hero.title: Welcome to my portfolio website
hero.desc: I create fast, high-quality, and visually engaging web experiences through modern technologies and premium design.
hero.sideDesc1: I create modern, aesthetic, and user-centered interfaces.
hero.sideDesc2: I build clean, understandable, and scalable frontend solutions.
hero.skillsDesc: Technologies I use to build modern and reliable frontend solutions.

about.title: A strategic approach to frontend development
about.desc: I do not just design interfaces. I build universal frontend systems that combine user behavior, business goals, and visual trust. Every section is fast, polished, and optimized for mobile devices.
about.introText: I focus on creating modern, clean, and user-friendly interfaces. In frontend development, I give special importance to responsive design, interactivity, and a professional visual appearance.

contentBlocks.title: Modern UI / UX

contentBlocks.text: I build websites that adapt perfectly to mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

contentBlocks.text: I create multi-language and multi-page websites with a flexible and scalable structure.

contentBlocks.title: WordPress Solutions
contentBlocks.text: I build fast, ready-to-use, and customizable websites based on WordPress templates and plugins.

contentBlocks.title: Project Ready
